content: What is Arcane Dominion guys
is it worth doing the carnal desires event when im like low level xd
is there any point
yes
:O
alritey
which one is the easiest one to do <a:hmmwtf:844118849721073695>
Support is a player's featured character. You're able to use Support in event stages, so you can borrow a whale's support to carry you in an event.
o

Previously, you needed to be a player's Mutual (follower that you follow back) to use their support character. Now you only need to copy their ID, go to Favorites search in the Support list, and put it in. Then you need to follow and set them as your favorite.
is there a list of whale ids
This is the only event that will give you seals as part of the stage farm reward. That stage will be unlocked on the last day.
oh so dont farm it until last day then?
I recommend you use a whale and an emergency gnosis to beat the hardest difficulty so you can farm more efficiently on the stages that you want. Like seals and maybe exp stage
ah ok
How many copies of Thais and her wheel do you have?
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/10UVim8m1SnY9fSDKfaH4AwnPPd22zsCDDNB6SV15yO4/edit?gid=558129882#gid=558129882

whale kath: 101131777
whale gmurphy: 100956623
do the other 2 units matter?
You should be doing the hardest difficulty you can on the stage that opens up each day. Events are more efficient to farm as a newer player
o i c
Spending energy on interlude might be more efficient for higher level players if they don't have enough copies of the featured awakener/wheel to give them a bonus
not for the bonus for this event
i c i c..
so i should use a whale support and try the lvl 60 difficulty one and emergency gnosis my way to victory?
Your energy still refills when overcapped, up to a limit of 300, but it's not worth it because its filling up ~3 times slower. So just farm a stage 🤷‍♂️
It depends, I think
If you're relying on emergency gnosis to progress story, you can be selective about it
ah
i havent used my emergency gnosis yet at all
but i am also only at chapter 5
If you're not going to be farming these 2 stages outside of the one time (for the event achievement), then using emergency gnosis to clear highest difficulty won't really give you much
been able to brute force everything so far with e3 gmurphy  and thais
wait so if i beat it once, do i get the reenact option?

I personally still need to level up a bunch of my awakeners, so I've been using my excess energy on the exp stage. If you're doing the same, then using an emergency gnosis to clear the hardest difficulty is worth it
Yep!
ahhhh ok
Not Madness though, Madness only gives you rewards once.
i desperately need exp
o i c
so not worth doing madness then?
for me
Do it.
It doesn't need stamina to do.
If you have spare gnosis, sure why not
ill give it a try then
It gives you a dreamspark and some stone frags from the achievement
gotta bash my head into the lvl 60 one first <:smh2:1109224474286501898>
by the way
if you use emergency gnosis then it can get refunded

> if you restart the fight it gets refunded
> if you game over and choose to retreat it gets refunded
> if you use the gnosis and then manually choose to leave the battle from the menu option it gets used up
oooooooooo thats good to know
i was worried id waste it
so if you're losing after you used up all of your gnosis, just let it kill you and then retreat. dont leave manually
sounds good ty

frenzies arent important at all, and they give only a single standard pull as a reward. but if you're wanting to unlock them, best to do it now while they're practically free

you don't have to own them to unlock them during the event, but outside the event you do have to own them

I've seen some Silver as reward so I thought it would be something I need to play eventually. Is the PVP like other gacha games? I usually heard they are pretty bad

you don't HAVE to play it but there are rewards, it's permanent rewards though so you can do whenever rather than a weekly/monthly kind of thing. as for how good it is, eh kinda depends, I'd say it's a bit similar to games like Hearthstone where there's very meta comps and they often rock paper scissor each other so if you get matched against a strong deck that counters yours, you just pretty much always lose

there is a draft mode too that's a lot more balanced since you get random stuff, but you need to know everything if you want to draft properly, so that has a huge barrier of entry compared to the normal build your deck
traphase just depends on how many characters you have
more dupes doesnt strengthen your wheels or characters
but you need to own that wheel or character to use them

no
that'd be impossible to balance I think cause a new player wouldn't even have enough chars to build a team
yeah
so draft you can use everything even if you don't own them, but you need to know what everything does
since you have like 15 or 20secs to pick
Or you can get the monthly

How much is the arc 2 death res different for A1?
75% less iirc
i can check
Wdym by *max of 300%*
It sounds like it means the conversion
Or is it that upper limit of dRes is 300
Pretty sure it is the conversion, yep
What does that mean
Do you get an option like gluttony
No
To keep on converting your dRes for hp
I mean I doubt it
The english isn't english-ing
I think it could mean if you've 375 dRes
It's takes away 75 and gives 10% hp bonus
~~If you've 350~~
~~It takes 50 and gives equivalent hp bonus~~
No
It takes away a 75% of your DR
If you have 400%+ DR, it takes away 300%
After 400%, it no longer stops being converted
This team has around ~707% DR, 300% got converted into max health
Oh no way
It's 75% *of DR% upto 300%*
its 75% of your total death resist
Yeah
The 75% isn't the dRes amount
It's the percentage value of dRes
Which is a % in itself
This reminded me of czn <:dead:1356082627509092372>

for DPS go crit
for others, look up what they scale with from their talents
for ones dont have talent with scaling it depends, you'd want some Death resistance, and maybe dmg amp
